foxy.options.enabled.name: Enable Foxy
foxy.options.enabled.tooltip: Master switch for Foxy LOD storage and rendering.
foxy.options.enable_rendering.name: Render distant LOD
foxy.options.enable_rendering.tooltip: Draw Foxy low-detail terrain independently from vanilla render distance.
foxy.options.ingest_enabled.name: Ingest loaded chunks
foxy.options.ingest_enabled.tooltip: Store loaded chunk sections so distant LOD can be rebuilt later.
Import existing singleplayer region files in the background so LOD is not limited to chunks loaded by vanilla.
foxy.options.section_render_distance.too: Radius of Foxy top-level LOD cells. This is separate from vanilla/Embeddium render distance.
foxy.options.vanilla_view_distance.name: Vanilla view distance
foxy.options.vanilla_view_distance.toolt: Sets Minecraft's own render distance (the inner ring of fully-detailed chunks). Edits are written straight into Minecraft's options, so Embeddium's Quality page reflects the same value.
foxy.options.service_threads.name: Foxy worker threads
foxy.options.service_threads.tooltip: Background workers used for ingest, mesh generation, and storage tasks.
foxy.options.keep_embeddium_builder_thre: When enabled, Foxy does not borrow Embeddium chunk builder thread capacity.
foxy.options.debug_disable_vanilla_terra: Suppresses Embeddium's chunk rendering so only Foxy LOD remains visible. Diagnostic only — used to confirm whether the LOD output exists past vanilla view distance. Leave off for normal play.
